designBrief.silhouette: massive hull, oversized angled howitzer — must read as heavy and dangerous
designBrief.palette: gunmetal with crimson/orange emissive accent strips
designBrief.materialFamily: rolled battle steel, scorched plating, riveted armor
designBrief.rtsReadabilityNotes: Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

promptCandidates: Stylized seamless sci-fi military vehicle hull texture sheet for a red faction siege platform / heavy assault in an alien RTS. Material: rolled battle steel, scorched plating, riveted armor. Palette: gunmetal with crimson/orange emissive accent strips, with a subtle low-contrast camouflage pattern in the faction hue. Rich surface detail: riveted armor plates, weld seams, maintenance hatches and access panels, air intakes and cooling grilles, stowed spare parts (track links, tool boxes), strapped-down reserve fuel canisters, scuffed edges and oil stains. Alien design language: brutalist, asymmetric reinforcement, battle wear, non-human panel language. Faction markings as abstract glyphs and small stencil icons. Forbidden: slim sporty shapes. Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

A seamless, orthographic texture-sheet of heavy assault vehicle hull plating. The base is dark gunmetal rolled battle steel, heavily scorched and riveted with oversized fasteners. Crimson and orange emissive accent strips glow intermittently, tracing strange, non-Euclidean conduits and alien-etched symbols across the surface. Intricate alien industrial surface details include hexagonal plating fused with organic-looking pipes and strange, pressure-relief vents that hint at immense internal power. No perspective, no baked lighting, no text, designed for a flat UV map.

An orthographic, seamless texture map depicting the rugged hull of a red siege platform. The surface is composed of thick, gunmetal rolled battle steel, exhibiting deep scorch marks and heavy-duty rivets securing plates that show signs of extreme wear. Bright crimson and fiery orange emissive strips pulse along deep structural channels and illuminate complex alien glyphs carved into the armor. Imaginative alien industrial details include energy conduits that appear to be woven from an unknown material, interlocking segmented armor scales, and strange, organic-metallic sensor arrays embedded flush with the surface. Flat texture-sheet style, absolutely no perspective, no baked lighting, and no textual elements.

notes: Gameplay stats are defined in src/data/unitClasses.ts and were not touched.
